# NumberInput

Collects a number with steppers, keyboard control, clamping, and Intl formatting.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/number-input
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="number-input"
  example={0}
  code={`<NumberInput aria-label="Quantity" defaultValue={1} min={0} max={10} />`}
/>

```tsx
<NumberInput aria-label="Quantity" defaultValue={1} min={0} max={10} />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="number-input"
  example={1}
  code={`<NumberInput aria-label="Step by 5" defaultValue={10} step={5} />`}
/>

```tsx
<NumberInput aria-label="Step by 5" defaultValue={10} step={5} />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="number-input"
  example={2}
  code={`<NumberInput aria-label="Price" defaultValue={19.99} step={0.5} formatOptions={{ style: "currency", currency: "USD" }} />`}
/>

```tsx
<NumberInput
  aria-label="Price"
  defaultValue={19.99}
  step={0.5}
  formatOptions={{ style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }}
/>
```

## Props

| Prop               | Type                                                                      | Required | Default | Description                                                           |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `align`            | `InputAlign`                                                              | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `className`        | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | Root className.                                                       |
| `clampValueOnBlur` | `boolean`                                                                 | No       | -       | Clamp the value into [min, max] on blur. Defaults to true.            |
| `decrementLabel`   | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | Accessible label for the decrement stepper.                           |
| `defaultValue`     | `number`                                                                  | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `hideStepper`      | `boolean`                                                                 | No       | -       | Hide the increment/decrement steppers.                                |
| `incrementLabel`   | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | Accessible label for the increment stepper.                           |
| `invalid`          | `boolean`                                                                 | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `largeStep`        | `number`                                                                  | No       | -       | Step applied to PageUp/PageDown. Defaults to \`step \* 10\`.          |
| `locale`           | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | BCP-47 locale used for display formatting.                            |
| `max`              | `number`                                                                  | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `min`              | `number`                                                                  | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `onValueChange`    | `(value: number \| null) => void`                                         | No       | -       | Called with the parsed numeric value (or null when empty/invalid).    |
| `formatOptions`    | `Intl.NumberFormatOptions`                                                | No       | -       | \`Intl.NumberFormat\` options applied to the displayed value on blur. |
| `rootProps`        | `Omit<InputRootProps, 'children' \| 'className' \| 'disabled' \| 'size'>` | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `size`             | `InputSize`                                                               | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `step`             | `number`                                                                  | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `value`            | `number \| null`                                                          | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
